message:
Hello,

I have just started to work on this technical issue and will get back to you soon with a solution and/or an explanation of what happened and why the problem cannot be corrected from our side.

Thank you for your patience.
Have a nice day,
Ark Patel

Hello,

Good news - I found the cause of the problem and prepared a solution.

To make sure my solution does not cause any complications elsewhere in the database, it is now being reviewed by a second developer. This won’t take long and you will receive the resolution and/or a link with a newly upgraded test database shortly.

Best regards,
Ark Patel

Hello, 

Good news! We found a solution for your problem and we have applied a fix specifically to your upgrade script, which will rectify the issue for every subsequent upgraded database. 

Here is the upgraded (test) database link: xxx

Can you please confirm the issue has indeed been resolved in this database?

If there is anything else we can do for you, please let us know. 

Thank you for your feedback
Best Regards,
Ark Patel

Hello,

Good news! We found a solution for your problem and we have applied a fix specifically to your upgrade script, which will rectify the issue for every subsequent upgraded database.

Please request for a new upgrade test database, to check for the changed.

Hello,

Thank you for your positive feedback. We are pleased that we were able to assist you in a timely manner and handle all of your concerns.

As we close this ticket, if you face any problems or issues, please open a new ticket at https://www.odoo.com/help and we will assist you again.

Thank you very much!

Best Regards,
Ark Patel
